creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2007-03-13 08:33:47 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    mail/smail           Makefile distinfo pkg-plist 
  Added files:
    mail/smail/files     freebsd5.in patch-util-Makefile 
  Removed files:
    mail/smail/files     EDITME freebsd2.0 
                         patch-conf_lib_mkdepend.sh 
    mail/smail/scripts   configure 
  Log:
  - Update to 3.2.0.121
  - fixed MASTER_SITES
  - merged two CONFLICTS lines to one :-)
  - support for NO_INSTALL_MANPAGES
  - support for cyrus_imapd via OPTIONS
  - /etc/mail/mailer.conf replacement configurable in OPTIONS
  - updated definitions and support for 64-bit systems
  
  PR:             110135
  Submitted by:   Martin Matuska <martin@matuska.org>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.45      +82 -15    ports/mail/smail/Makefile
  1.13      +3 -3      ports/mail/smail/distinfo
  1.4       +0 -2      ports/mail/smail/files/EDITME (dead)
  1.9       +0 -81     ports/mail/smail/files/freebsd2.0 (dead)
  1.1       +89 -0     ports/mail/smail/files/freebsd5.in (new)
  1.2       +0 -13     ports/mail/smail/files/patch-conf_lib_mkdepend.sh (dead)
  1.1       +42 -0     ports/mail/smail/files/patch-util-Makefile (new)
  1.14      +10 -0     ports/mail/smail/pkg-plist
  1.5       +0 -6      ports/mail/smail/scripts/configure (dead)
